latestComments.text: Luckily I get to see them over and over IRL 😁🙏🌌

Hi Google Team,
I’m not sure if this is the best place to reach out, but I’m left with no other option. I have five Google accounts, all of which have active Google One subscriptions and upgraded storage for over five years. Unfortunately, the only device they were last signed in on is now broken.
I’m trying to recover access — I still have the recovery phone number, but I no longer have the passwords. These accounts contain very important data accumulated over the past five years, and the main reason I’ve continued paying for these services was to feel secure in situations like this.
I sincerely hope this message reaches the appropriate team and that I can receive the support needed to recover my accounts.
Thank you.
🤗 Something for the Christmas holiday would be nice 🎄🎅

caption:
Getting your Halloween couples costume ready has never been easier 🎃 Here’s how to create your spooky duo with #NanoBanana and #Veo3 in @googlegemini: 

📸 Snap a pic (or two!), press Nano Banana, and ask: “Reimagine us in a [insert costume].”
📹 Pro/Ultra users tap “Create videos with Veo” to animate your duo.
